overall.description: A first-person walk through a rain-soaked cyberpunk city at night, featuring neon-lit storefronts, holographic advertisements, street vendors, and a waterfront canal. The footage is from a video game (Cyberpunk 2077) with high-fidelity ray-traced graphics and heavy atmospheric rain effects.

scene_state.functional_zone: neon-lit pedestrian shopping street with street furniture

events.description: exiting the covered walkway into the open plaza with holographic advertisements

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the rain-soaked pedestrian street, passing by neon storefronts and scattered street furniture

entered.detail: bright cyan illuminated shop front with vertical neon signage
scattered metal chairs and tables on the wet pavement
food vendor stall with blue umbrella canopy
large floating holographic advertisement displaying '35V6' with a woman's face

segments.scene_description: The segment opens on a rain-soaked pedestrian street lined with a bright cyan neon storefront and scattered metal chairs. The camera walks forward through the downpour, passing a food stall with a blue canopy before emerging into an open plaza dominated by a massive holographic billboard.

scene_state.functional_zone: open commercial plaza with massive holographic advertisements

events.description: slight turn to the right while navigating around the holographic billboard structure

agents.ego_description: walking through the open plaza, passing by the large holographic advertisement and other pedestrians in the rain

notable_agents.action: pedestrian walking across the plaza in the rain

entered.detail: illuminated digital billboard structure with multiple advertisement screens
curved ramp structure leading to an upper pedestrian level

segments.scene_description: The scene opens into a wide plaza dominated by the massive '35V6' holographic billboard. The camera passes a digital advertising kiosk on the left and an elevated pedestrian bridge on the right, while navigating around other pedestrians walking through the rain-slicked open space.

scene_state.functional_zone: street food vendor area with illuminated food carts

events.description: approaching food carts with warm orange and cyan lighting visible through the rain

agents.ego_description: walking past illuminated food carts where vendors are working, with steam rising from the cooking equipment

notable_agents.action: food vendor working at the illuminated cart under the rain

entered.detail: blue food cart with warm yellow interior lighting and umbrella
red food cart with bright cyan work light and cooking equipment
dark water canal reflecting neon lights from surrounding buildings

segments.scene_description: The camera approaches two illuminated food carts—one blue with warm lighting and one red with cyan work lights—where a vendor is preparing food. In the distance, a dark canal becomes visible, reflecting the neon lights of the surrounding cyberpunk cityscape.

scene_state.functional_zone: waterfront canal promenade with metal railings

events.description: transitioning from vendor area to waterfront canal walkway alongside the water

agents.ego_description: walking along the edge of the canal, with colorful neon reflections visible in the water

entered.detail: metal truss bridge crossing the canal ahead with illuminated supports
black metal safety railing along the water edge
green spiral illuminated building decoration on the right facade

segments.scene_description: The scene transitions to a narrow waterfront promenade alongside the canal, with metal railings on the right and the dark water reflecting neon lights. The camera walks toward a metal bridge in the distance, passing a green spiral neon structure on the right building facade.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement from a narrow, neon-lit pedestrian street into a wide urban plaza and finally along a dark waterfront promenade. It begins by walking through a heavy downpour past a cyan storefront and a blue-canopied food stall before the space opens up into a vast plaza dominated by a massive 35V6 holographic billboard. As the camera navigates around pedestrians and passes a digital kiosk and elevated bridge, the scene shifts toward a pair of illuminated red and blue food carts. The perspective then moves past these vendors as a dark canal emerges in the distance, reflecting the city's vibrant lights. Finally, the camera transitions onto a narrow promenade, passing a green spiral neon structure while heading toward a distant metal bridge over the shimmering water.
